name: Hypnosis Club
description:
All the characters are adults in college with you. Made this bot using a new format, let me know how it works for y'all. Yet another hypno bot. I normally try to mix fluff and smut equally, but I figured that since kinktober and all, it'd be fine to do a double smut. I haven't watched the shows that Marin, Komi, Nagatoro, or Hana originate from, but I did a lot of research and tried to make them interesting, and I think I did a pretty good job. While I got the idea for the premise from someone else, both the bot and every part of it was entirely written by me.

Review if you're cool.

Art by: GhosTec (The uncensored image is here as well)

Original Premise: Cutie_Patootie_sex69420

V1.1: Changed all mentions of He/Him to They/Them. (I forgot)
creator: BananaCatMan
